Uses of Package
com.longport.market

  • Packages that use com.longport.market 
    Package Description
    com.longport  
    com.longport.market  
  • Classes in com.longport.market used by com.longport 
    Class Description
    AhPremiumOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getAhPremium(com.longport.market.AhPremiumOptions).
    BrokerHoldingDailyOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getBrokerHoldingDaily(com.longport.market.BrokerHoldingDailyOptions).
    BrokerHoldingOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getBrokerHolding(com.longport.market.BrokerHoldingOptions).
    TopMoversOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getTopMovers(com.longport.market.TopMoversOptions).
  • Classes in com.longport.market used by com.longport.market 
    Class Description
    AhPremiumIntraday
    Intraday A/H premium data points for a dual-listed security.
    AhPremiumKline
    One A/H premium data point.
    AhPremiumKlines
    Historical A/H premium K-line data for a dual-listed security.
    AhPremiumOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getAhPremium(com.longport.market.AhPremiumOptions).
    AhPremiumPeriod
    K-line period for A/H premium data.
    AnomalyItem
    One market anomaly event, e.g. a large block trade or margin buying surge.
    AnomalyResponse
    Market anomaly alerts response for a security.
    BrokerHoldingChanges
    Changes in a broker's holding or ratio over 1 / 5 / 20 / 60 day periods.
    BrokerHoldingDailyHistory
    Historical daily broker holding records for a security.
    BrokerHoldingDailyItem
    One day's broker holding record.
    BrokerHoldingDailyOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getBrokerHoldingDaily(com.longport.market.BrokerHoldingDailyOptions).
    BrokerHoldingDetail
    Full broker holding detail list for a security.
    BrokerHoldingDetailItem
    One broker's full holding detail with ratio and share count changes.
    BrokerHoldingEntry
    One broker entry in a top net-buying or net-selling list.
    BrokerHoldingOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getBrokerHolding(com.longport.market.BrokerHoldingOptions).
    BrokerHoldingPeriod
    Lookback period for broker holding net change.
    BrokerHoldingTop
    Top brokers by net buying and net selling for a security.
    ConstituentStock
    One constituent stock of a market index.
    IndexConstituents
    Constituent stocks of a market index with daily movement summary.
    MarketContext
    Market data context — broker holdings, A/H premium, trade statistics, market anomalies, index constituents and more.
    MarketStatusResponse
    Trading status response for one or more markets.
    MarketTimeItem
    Trading status for one market.
    RankCategoriesResponse
    Response for MarketContext.getRankCategories().
    RankListItem
    One item in the popularity rank list.
    RankListOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getRankList(com.longport.market.RankListOptions).
    RankListResponse
    Response for MarketContext.getRankList(com.longport.market.RankListOptions).
    TopMoversEvent
    One top-movers event.
    TopMoversOptions
    Options for MarketContext.getTopMovers(com.longport.market.TopMoversOptions).
    TopMoversResponse
    Response for MarketContext.getTopMovers(com.longport.market.TopMoversOptions).
    TopMoversStock
    Stock information in a top-movers event.
    TradePriceLevel
    Trade volume at one price level.
    TradeStatistics
    Summary trade statistics for a security.
    TradeStatsResponse
    Trade statistics response including summary and per-price-level breakdown.
